title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and Update available
scenario: Device Home Screen displays "Software Update" and "Release Notes" buttons in status box when firmware update is available for connected headset
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected and paired to the Android device.
3. Navigate to the Home screen of the app.
4. Confirm that a firmware update is available for the connected headset.
5. Observe the status box located under the Battery icons on the Device Home Screen.
6. Check for the presence of a "Software Update" button within the status box.
7. Check for the presence of a "Release Notes" button within the status box.
expected: The Device Home Screen displays both "Software Update" and "Release Notes" buttons in the status box under the Battery icons when a firmware update is available.
